purpose: Vertical sequence of timestamped events. Used for activity feeds, audit logs, change history, task timelines.
whenToUse: Activity feed of recent events on an object
Sequence of related events in chronological order
whenNotToUse: Live chat — use FeedListItem in a List
doRules: Show user + action + timestamp per event
dontRules: Do not paginate Timeline visibly — show recent N + a "See more" link
Do not interleave with other content

layoutGuidance.placement: Place Timeline inside a compatible container (DynamicPage, Panel, Card).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for data display.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
